name: ar-agents
description: Open infrastructure for Argentina's sociedades de IA (AI-operated companies, draft General Companies Law art. 14). 33 npm packages, 221 typed tools for the Vercel AI SDK 6, 6 RFCs, forensic audit log.

scripts.check-manifests: node scripts/regen-manifests.mjs && git diff --exit-code packages/*/tools.manifest.json || (echo "manifests stale, run pnpm regen-manifests" >&2; exit 1)
